blockingIssues.description: Full scrutiny validator command `TMPDIR=/home/whoami/dev/openGecko/data bun run test -- --maxWorkers=4` now fails on `tests/invalid-params.test.ts > enforces snake_case keys across representative family responses` timing out at 5000ms, so the baseline-stability milestone is not currently validation-green even though the reviewed shipped features passed code review.

appliedUpdates.description: No manifest change applied; existing api-validation stop command already handles port 3102 cleanup, so the observation is noted but not an additive manifest update candidate.

rejectedObservations.observation: Record the current invalid-params timeout as a failure of the cancelled feature baseline-invalid-params-timeout-hardening.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because that feature is explicitly cancelled/non-shipping history and the current timeout is a fresh validator regression rather than evidence of shipped implementation for the cancelled feature.

rejectedObservations.observation: The original worker had to reverse-engineer that persisted Binance ticker data can contain duplicate `base/target` rows with different canonical `coin_id` values and that emitted ticker ordering follows persisted USD volume ranking after deduplication. That repository-specific exchange baseline is still not captured in the repo-local worker library.
rejectedObservations.reason: deferred because the current scrutiny run is already failing on validators and this knowledge note is non-blocking; no library update was required to complete this synthesis.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker hit an `EADDRINUSE` condition on port 3102 during manual verification because a prior validation API process was already listening there; reviewer-facing guidance says to stop any existing 3102 listener first, but `.factory/services.yaml` only defines start/stop commands and does not document that this collision is a known recurring validator hazard.
rejectedObservations.reason: already addressed operationally by existing `.factory/services.yaml` stop command and AGENTS guidance; no safe additive manifest change was necessary.
